eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Douglas; Lyon; Storey; Carson City, NV; at 10:59 AM on SEP 18, 2019 Effective until 11:14 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: :Lyon County authorities have issued a REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for Douglas, Carson City, Lyon, Storey and Alpine Counties. This is only a test. No action required
